articles.author: John Timmer
articles.title: TerraPower gets OK to start construction of its first nuclear plant - Ars Technica
articles.description: Plant won't be done until 2030 at the earliest, and it still needs an operating license.

articles.title: Colossal Biosciences breeds controversy while trying to revive mammoths - NPR
articles.description: A Texas biotech company is trying to bring mammoths and other extinct creatures back to life. The science is as intriguing as the ethical questions are thorny.
articles.content:
When the elevator doors part on the second floor of a two-story brick and glass building in an office park on the outskirts of downtown Dallas, it feels like a portal opening to a different world.
